name: AWS IAM Support Role Exists
description: An IAM role with the AWSSupportAccess managed policy should exist to enable authorized personnel to manage incidents with AWS Support
remediation: Create an IAM role with the AWSSupportAccess managed policy attached for support case management
remediation_steps: Navigate to IAM in AWS Console
Select trusted entity (e.g., another AWS account or IAM users)
Search for and attach 'AWSSupportAccess' managed policy
Name the role (e.g., 'SupportRole') and create it
Grant assume role permissions to authorized users/groups
